Located 60 km from the Town of Jasper, Jasper Gates Resort offers rustic log cabins and motel accommodation.

All rooms are fitted with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. Certain units feature a seating area where you can relax. Each room is equipped with a private bathroom equipped with a shower.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Overlander Mountain Lodge in Jasper offers family rooms with balconies, kitchenettes, and private bathrooms. Each room features air-conditioning, a work desk, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: The on-site restaurant serves lunch and dinner with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Guests can relax at the terrace, bar, or outdoor seating area.
Convenient Services: The lodge provides free toiletries, a fireplace, and a tea and coffee maker. Additional amenities include bicycle parking, express check-in and check-out, and daily housekeeping.
Activities and Location: Guests can enjoy hiking and mountain views from the property. Located on Highway 16, the lodge is highly rated for its scenic location and excellent service.
